openalex.name: openalex
openalex.description: Query OpenAlex (a free, ~250M-work bibliographic database) for finance/economics literature: top-cited papers in a topic, recent work in a specific venue, forward/backward citation traversal, an author's bibliography. Use this for any structured literature query where you want hallucination-free, real-DOI results. Complementary to WebSearch (which remains the right tool for grey literature, news, and very-recent uploads).
